creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, Dec 27, 2009 at 02:50:26 +0800, Li-Wen Hsu wrote:
> Hello,
> 	Could you provide the patch for update devel/gdb6 to
> 	devel/gdb66 ?  Then we are ready for repocopy.

Sorry about the typo, what I meant was a patch for updating devel/gdb6
to GDB 6.8.
